mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.login_name AS loginName, u.user_name AS userName, u.user_password AS userPassword, u.rbac_policy AS rbacPolicy, u.user_state_info AS userStateInfo, u.del_cd AS delCd, (SELECT MIN(ur.role_id) FROM dashboard_user_role ur WHERE ur.user_id = u.user_id) AS roleId FROM dashboard_user u WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT CAST(res_type AS BIGINT) AS resType FROM dashboard_role_res rr WHERE rr.role_id = #{roleId} AND (rr.del_cd IS NULL OR UPPER(rr.del_cd) != 'X') ORDER BY resType ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE dashboard_user SET rbac_policy = #{rbacPolicy}, user_state_info = #{userStateInfo}, user_last_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE dashboard_user SET rbac_policy = 0, user_state_info = '0', user_last_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT role_name FROM dashboard_role WHERE role_id = #{roleId}

SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.login_name AS loginName, u.user_name AS userName, (SELECT MIN(ur.role_id) FROM dashboard_user_role ur WHERE ur.user_id = u.user_id) AS roleId, (SELECT r.role_name FROM dashboard_role r WHERE r.role_id = (SELECT MIN(ur.role_id) FROM dashboard_user_role ur WHERE ur.user_id = u.user_id)) AS roleName, u.user_status AS userStatus, u.del_cd AS delCd FROM dashboard_user u WHERE (u.del_cd IS NULL OR UPPER(u.del_cd) != 'Y') ORDER BY u.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dashboard_user ( user_id, login_name, user_name, user_password, user_status, rbac_policy, user_state_info, del_cd ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{loginName}, #{userName}, #{passwordHash}, 'active', 0, '0', 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE dashboard_user SET del_cd = 'Y', user_status = 'inactive', user_last_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
